app.name: Academic Agent Framework
app.buildDirtyTooltip: ⚠ Working tree has uncommitted changes — the running process does NOT match any committed sha exactly.
app.buildUnknownTooltip: Backend was built without git metadata (e.g. inside a Docker image with no AAF_BUILD_SHA set).

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Self-hosted academic agent framework — at-a-glance state.
dashboard.noTasksHint: Kick off a research workflow to start populating the trace timeline.

workbench.title: Writing Workbench
workbench.description: Cursor-style file tree + editor + chat for the active manuscript. Drag the dividers to resize, hide a pane via its header button.
workbench.noManuscriptHint: Pick a manuscript in Research Console → Writing tab to open it here.

chat.title: Paper Chat
chat.description: Conversational analysis & revision of a manuscript section. Ask a question first, accept the rewrite second.
chat.pickManuscript: Pick a manuscript to chat about
chat.pickTarget: Pick a file inside the bundle
chat.pickTargetHint: Click any file to start chatting about it. Folders are expanded by default — use the controls above to collapse/expand.
chat.pickFileFirst: Pick a file before asking a question.
chat.noManuscriptsHint: Upload a paper from the Manuscripts page, then come back here to chat about it.
chat.noFilesHint: This bundle has no readable text files. Upload some .tex or .md files first.
chat.previewHint: Read-only snapshot of the file the agent is looking at.
chat.noPreview: Pick a file to see its content here.
chat.startHint: No turns yet — type below to start.

empty.title: Start a conversation
empty.description: Ask the agent anything about the selected passage: 'Does this sound too AI?', 'Is the contribution clearly stated?', 'Suggest 2 tighter sentences'. The agent answers in prose — it only rewrites when you switch to Rewrite mode or click 'Rewrite based on this'.

chat.modeReviseHint: Rewrites the file. Bundle gets updated.
chat.composerPlaceholder: Ask anything about the selected passage. ⌘/Ctrl + Enter to send.
chat.singleLayoutTitle: Chat works best with bundle manuscripts
chat.singleLayoutHint: This is a single-file manuscript. Use the Revision Studio for single-file revisions; convert to a bundle if you'd like a conversational flow with multiple sections.

research.title: Research Console
research.description: Find external papers and run multi-agent research / write workflows. To analyze or revise YOUR own draft, use Paper Chat or Revision Studio — pick a manuscript from the Manuscripts page first.
research.descriptionV2: One console, two workflows: investigate external papers under Research, or open a manuscript under Writing to edit it conversationally in the Workbench.

tabs.writingHint: Pick a manuscript and open it in the workbench

empty.title: No manuscripts yet
empty.description: Upload or create a manuscript first — once you have one, it'll show up here and click-through to the workbench.

research.waitingHint: Submit the form on the left. Each event from the backend (Planner, Executor, Evaluator, Evolver) shows up here as it streams over SSE.

useAsContext.title: Use these papers as revision context
useAsContext.hint_one: {{count}} paper was indexed into your knowledge store and will be available to Paper Chat / Revision Studio as citation context.
useAsContext.hint_other: {{count}} papers were indexed into your knowledge store and will be available to Paper Chat / Revision Studio as citation context.
useAsContext.noManuscripts: Upload a manuscript first to use these papers as context.

manuscripts.title: Manuscripts
manuscripts.description: Your paper library — upload, list, and open. Use the row actions to start a conversation about a paper (Paper Chat) or jump straight into reviewer-comments-driven revision (Revision Studio).

actions.chatTitle: Open a Paper Chat about this manuscript (analyze first, rewrite when you say so)
actions.reviseNeedsVersion: Add an initial version before revising

manuscripts.noItemsHint: Run the write workflow to produce a draft, upload a file, or import an existing project folder.
manuscripts.importFolderDescription: Point AAF at an existing project directory like /Users/you/Code/Academic-Agent/data/papers/paper-dataagent-eval. Choose Copy to make a self-contained copy under AAF data, or Link to keep the original folder in place (live edits in both directions).
manuscripts.deleteConfirmLink: Remove "{{title}}" from AAF? Your local folder will NOT be deleted.
manuscripts.deleteConfirmCopy: Delete "{{title}}" and all its copied files? This cannot be undone.

bundle.exportSubdirAuto: Auto-detect (overleaf/ if present, else whole bundle)
bundle.convertHelp: Switches this manuscript from single-document to project (file tree). Existing single-doc text is kept as v1 history but no longer editable here.
bundle.selectFileHint: Select a file in the tree to view or edit it.
bundle.binaryFile: Binary file ({{mime}}, {{size}}). Use Download to fetch it.
bundle.noFiles: Empty bundle. Upload a file or run an Import.
bundle.reviseThisFileHint: Open the Revision Studio with this file pre-selected as the agent's target.
bundle.reviseTextOnly: Only text files (.tex / .md / .txt / .rst) can be revised.

revision.title: Revision Studio
revision.description: Reviewer-comments-driven rewrite of a manuscript section. Drop one or more comments, point at a draft / target file, watch the agent apply them. Want a conversational analyze-first flow instead? Try Paper Chat.

bundle.targetFileHint: Pick the bundle file the agent should rewrite.
bundle.noTargetFiles: This bundle has no .tex / .md files to revise.
bundle.diffEmpty: Pick a target file on the left.
bundle.rerunHint: Re-running will overwrite the file again. Use the Manuscripts page to download a backup if needed.

library.title: Knowledge Library
library.description: Curated knowledge cards, synthesised insights, and document corpora.

memory.title: Memory Explorer
memory.description: Inspect every memory store that the agent reads from at runtime.

knowledge.title: Knowledge cards
knowledge.showingMore: Showing {{shown}} of {{total}}. Refine the filters to narrow.

empty.title: No knowledge cards
empty.description: Use "New card" for manual entries or "Ingest paper" to extract from a file.

paperForm.citationBibtexHint: Paste the BibTeX entry for this paper
paperForm.experimentResultsHint: Optional. Required if you cite numeric results from this paper.
paperForm.summaryHint: Your distilled reading note. Distinct from the abstract.

documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: External materials, books, and notes ingested for chunk-level RAG retrieval. Distinct from knowledge cards (your structured reading notes).
documents.ingestHint: Opens the Knowledge Library page where you can upload PDFs / markdown / paste text.

empty.title: No documents yet
empty.description: Drop a PDF, markdown, or paste a note in the Knowledge Library.

documents.editHint: Edits title / summary / tags / source. Body and chunks are not touched — use Reindex if you want to re-chunk.
documents.reindexHint: Re-chunk and re-embed this document (slow for large files).
documents.confirmDelete: Delete "{{title}}" and prune its chunks from the vector store? This cannot be undone.

reflections.title: Reflections
reflections.editHint: Provenance fields (run id, session id, user id) are pinned by the backend; only content / type / tags are editable.
reflections.emptyDescription: Evaluator and Evolver write here at the end of each run; you can also add notes manually.
reflections.confirmBulkDelete: Bulk delete every reflection matching session={{session}} run={{run}}? This cannot be undone.
reflections.bulkHint: Delete every reflection matching the current Session / Run filter.
reflections.bulkRequiresFilter: Set Session and/or Run before bulk delete — refusing unbounded delete.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Capabilities the agent can match against a query. Drilling in shows the SKILL.md and any scripts the host can execute.

graph.selectHint: Click a node to see its SKILL.md and scripts.
graph.editHint: Edges come from each SKILL.md's compatibility.upstream / .downstream. Edit those fields to change the graph.
graph.editableHint: Drag from a node's right edge to another's left edge to add a downstream edge. Click an edge then press Delete (or use the trash button) to remove it.

mcp.title: MCP Servers
mcp.description: Connected Model-Context-Protocol servers and the tools they expose to the agent.

planner.title: Planner DAG
planner.description: Compile a natural-language goal into a declarative plan, validate it, and execute the DAG step by step.

proposals.title: Proposals
proposals.description: Self-evolution drafts queued by the EvolverAgent. Review, approve, and apply learned heuristics here.

actions.applyToBundleHint: Write the recorded after-content back to the manuscript file (does NOT change proposal status).
actions.forceHint: Override the staleness check when the file has been edited locally since this proposal was drafted.

bundle.linkedRiskRefused: This linked manuscript only accepts low-risk auto-writes.

errors.stale: Bundle file changed since this proposal was drafted. Re-run the workflow, or click Force to overwrite anyway.
errors.missingPayload: Proposal does not carry a bundle change.
errors.missingManuscript: Manuscript not found or no longer a bundle.
errors.writeFailed: Could not write the bundle file.

synthesize.hint: Review the last 5 successful runs and propose ONE shared heuristic. Replaces the pre-P9 'auto-draft per run' behaviour.
synthesize.success: Drafted a synthesised proposal from recent runs.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.description: Every workflow run, with budget usage, events, and status.

detail.title: Task #{{id}}
detail.processHint: Timeline of stages and events emitted while the workflow ran.
detail.resultEmpty: This task didn't produce a structured result. Check the event timeline above for what happened.
detail.inputHint: Exactly what was sent to the workflow.
detail.compareNoDiff: No textual diff is available for this workflow shape.
detail.followUpHint: Send another message on the same manuscript context. The new run reuses the manuscript / bundle target from this task; for single-doc revision the latest revised text is auto-loaded.
detail.followUpPlaceholder: What should the next turn focus on?

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage the running framework — provider keys, runtime profile, registered workflows and tools.

llm.title: LLM Provider
llm.description: Active provider for chat and tool calls. Edits hot-reload — running tasks keep the provider they were started with.
llm.apiKeyKept: Stored — leave blank to keep, type a new one to replace.
llm.clearConfirm: Clear the runtime override and fall back to env-only config?
llm.cleared: Override cleared. Falling back to env-only config.
llm.arqWarning: An ARQ worker process is running. It will not pick up this override until restarted.

providerHint.openai: Compatible with the OpenAI Chat Completions schema (also fits Together, Groq, DeepSeek, etc. via base URL).
providerHint.anthropic: Anthropic Messages API. Models like claude-3-5-sonnet-latest.
providerHint.ollama: Local Ollama daemon — no API key needed, but base URL is required (default http://127.0.0.1:11434/v1).
providerHint.mock: In-process mock provider. Useful for development without burning API credits.

onboarding.title: Welcome to AAF
onboarding.subtitle: Pick an LLM provider to get started. You can change it any time in Settings.
onboarding.useMock: Skip — start with the mock provider

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.

errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that

fallback.title: Task failed
fallback.hint: Something went wrong while running this task. Inspect the technical details below, then try again — or check your provider settings and budget.

LLMStreamError.title: LLM connection interrupted
LLMStreamError.hint: The provider closed the streaming connection mid-response. Common causes: flaky network, the provider throttling, or an idle TLS keep-alive. Try again; if it keeps happening, switch to the non-streaming path or pick a different model.

LLMTimeout.title: LLM request timed out
LLMTimeout.hint: The provider didn't reply within the configured window. Try a smaller prompt, a faster model, or check your network.

LLMRateLimit.title: Provider rate limit hit
LLMRateLimit.hint: Your account is being throttled. Wait the retry-after window, lower parallelism, or switch to a different provider.

LLMAuthError.title: LLM authentication failed
LLMAuthError.hint: Your API key is missing, expired, or doesn't grant access to this model. Open Settings → Providers and re-enter the key.

LLMContextWindowError.title: Prompt exceeded context window
LLMContextWindowError.hint: The conversation got too long for this model. Enable auto-compaction, pick a larger-window model, or trim attached documents.

LLMAPIError.title: LLM API error
LLMAPIError.hint: The provider returned an unexpected response. Check the technical details and try again — if it persists, the upstream service may be having an incident.

BrokenPipeError.title: LLM connection broken
BrokenPipeError.hint: The socket to the LLM provider was severed. Usually a transient network blip — just retry. If your provider is behind a VPN, double-check the tunnel.

ValueError.title: Invalid input
ValueError.hint: Some of the inputs to the workflow were missing or malformed. The technical details below pinpoint which field needs attention.

ManuscriptNotFound.title: Manuscript not found
ManuscriptNotFound.hint: The manuscript referenced by this task was removed or its id is stale. Refresh the manuscripts list and try again.

ManuscriptPathInvalid.title: Invalid bundle path
ManuscriptPathInvalid.hint: The target file path is empty, absolute, or escapes the manuscript root. Re-pick the file from the bundle explorer.

WorkflowCancelled.title: Task cancelled
WorkflowCancelled.hint: This task was cancelled by you or the system. Start a new run when you're ready.
